sentences.text: Yo, what's good, Austin?
How you doing, Phil?
I'm doing alright, man.
How was your long weekend?
It was great.
I, took off yesterday, too, so made it a little extra long, so…
There you go.
Just, we just hung out, didn't go anywhere either, so just kind of relaxed.
It was a hectic, summer, so it felt good to just, Just chill out and, watch some football, really.
Hell yeah.
That sounds like a great time.
I also stayed local, just tried to relax.
I feel like we've been traveling a lot, so…
Shit.
Bill?
I did want to talk today and see if we could figure out when we wanted to go to Atlanta.
To try and get these guys on board.
I'd love to not travel again in September.
Do we want to kick it to, like, early October?
Yeah, actually, I was trying to… that would work perfectly.
I'm going to be, going to Rangewater, they have a golf outing on, October 6th.
Okay.
So, if, if we also then wanted to, like, maybe pop into RAM, like, on the 7th?
Sure.
Or, like, anybody else, too, that you're thinking in Atlanta.
I know we've got a few, like, I know I've got Gallery down there, who's the other one down there?
RMR is down there.
So I'd love to do that loop.
Alright, so then, do you want to reach out?
Like, do you think that's best coming from you, or, like, should I try?
Because I feel like… I feel like they're really funny about getting back to us.
Yeah, I don't mind.
I can shoot them a note, because, they never really said anything back from our last in-person classic.
Yeah.
But, yeah, I think it'd work.
I mean, like, they're always pretty receptive to me.
I just usually say, like, hey, I'm gonna be in town, like, do either of these dates work for you?
And usually they… they have time, so.
I can just put you on CC, too, and just say that we'll both be there.
Yeah.
And then, yeah, so probably… I could say… I mean, ideally the 7th, but I could even maybe stay till the 8th if need be, but I'll just…
I don't want you to be on the ground too long, but, I know they… they always say that, like, they… they're in the office sometimes, right?
So, I feel like if we give them Tuesday or Wednesday, I feel like it's more likely that we hit them.
Yeah, I think they do say… I think that should… if I remember right, for whatever reason, I think they do say, like, usually Tuesdays they're in.
Perfect.
Alright.
I'll, get that message out to them.
Usually it takes a few nudges anyway, so I.
I know.
Keep me on CC, and then I'll nudge one, and then you can nudge one, and then we'll just hopefully get them.
Now that we're, you know, we're talking a month out, surely we can get them.
Yeah, so definitely want to see… I think, showing them, By then, too, maybe we could do it, like, an in-person demo of, I'm just completely blanking, yes.
Yeah, premium, yep.
I showed them Explore, and they were pretty jacked on that.
and then I guess I'll see what they have to say about Premium, because I think we basically said that we would give Explore Basic for free.
Which is…
Crazy, we've been holding it for…
Oh, I didn't realize… I didn't even know they didn't have that, so…
Yeah.
That should be a slam dunk, either way.
It should, and just kind of… I kind of set the bar a little bit high with, like, seeing, like, at least 75%, we can at least, you know.
push it back into their court and really just get a… we just need to get a number out of them, like, whether.
Yeah.
commit to.
Exactly.
And then, yeah, I think, I mean, they've been really happy, so…
That's great.
Yeah.

Yeah, so, if you could get that off, because I know, I think George will be back next week, and he has been, like, hounding me, like, yo, like, when are you going to Atlanta, what's going on with Ram, blah blah blah.
So, if we can get that done, and I can tell him, like, we got it.
on the map, he'd be psyched, I'd be psyched, and then surely we're gonna get the renewal, right?
I mean, I don't see anything that gets in the way, it's just figuring out, are we gonna lift, or are we gonna leave it flat, right?
Right.
Yeah, I think if we could get, if we… if we can get, like, the increase in units, that'd be ideal.
Yeah, and then we leave it flat for them.
Yeah.
basically, we even said, I mean, it technically would be a price break, but it would still be way more MRR for us.
Like, we said, we'd give them a custom quote if they could commit.
Okay.
You know, again, they just won't commit to a number right now.

That's, like, basically what we need to get out of them, is just, like, hey, like, yeah, we can give you, like, XYZ and maybe even a better, you know, per unit price, but you'd have to at least, you know, get to this threshold.
How big are the total units?
You said 70,000… was it 70,000 total units?
No, like, 85K now.
I mean, they're pretty big.
I wonder if should we give them, like, tiers, and be like, yo, if you could get to 60, it'll be X.
If you can get to 70,000, it would be X.
We just did that for Bell, and they were pretty cool on it.
I wonder if, like, for these bigger customers, if it makes sense to give them targets like that?
Yeah.

Well, I agree, like, I… the hard… the tough thing is, like, they, like, just straight up, like, wouldn't… they're just like, we just don't even… like, they would give no… they're just, like, they're just really close to the chest, they give no, like.
insight on even, like, what would a possible, like, threshold numbers even be?

Like, they're, like… They're pretty, just like, we just will add… what they've been doing right now is, like, anything that they bring on, they're like, we add it, but, like, we can't… like, they don't know exactly how many properties, you know, they're gonna bring on next quarter.
Alright.
So they're… yeah, they've been… frustrating, but at least we have them at $0.
60, and they've been continuously adding, so…
like, that's not a huge discount, that's, like, that's basically book, right?
Like, that's list price.
Right, like, it's actually pretty high, especially for the threshold that they're at now.
Like, at the last I looked, I think they're, like, over… like, 40,000 units now.
So that's actually, like, good, like, a good deal on our end.
Like, usually with that many units, you'd be, like.
in the low 50s.
Right.

So… And I don't know, too, like, I think we… did we decide, like, they're kind of unique as well, like, they're all individually signed contracts with auto renewals, so, like, I mean, they're not really ever gonna churn, like, at, like, what they're doing right now.
I think what Heath and George want is for us to sign an MSA that basically cancels all those individual ones out, and just, like, every year, everything you have with us is gonna renew on X date.
Right, just like…
So that's how we want to position it.
Right.
But yeah, right now, they're just auto-renewing shit.
I'm not even saying things.
I'm just like, yep, cool, alright.
Yeah, absolutely.
But… so yeah, I'll get that out, and we can kind of just hammer it home again, like, hey, we're trying to work with you here, like, we want to get everything.
Obviously, they… They would want that, too, for their business.
Right.
So, yeah, I'll send them a note.
Any, All the, like, our billing is so annoying, dude, like, what is going… like, come on.
I don't know.
Like, that shit with Portico, like, and Danielle was like, oh, we don't know what to do?
I'm like, bro, just use… what was the last thing they told you?
Cancel it?
Cancel it.
Right.
That's what… I send all… anytime I get anything, I just send the last correspondence.
I'm like, hey, here's the update from Portico, like… that and then… yeah, it's that and then just the, like, I don't understand why our billing seems to always get confused, too, like…
like, Waterton, too?
Like, why the fuck… Christian… like, you were in that thread, I think, with Kristen and Joe.
They're like, yup, that works.
Christian's like, yup, that template will be fine.
And then 3 months in a row, June, July, August, the template is just… What the fuck?
Yeah, some of those internal things are just so annoying, dude.
Yeah.
It sounds like Erica's on top of it, she just sent something yesterday.
I don't think I've seen anything from Amy come through just yet, but I'll have a better idea later this afternoon.
Hopefully, it's what she needs.
Yeah, and then the only other thing, was are we all… I kind of know, like, there was… we handed it back off, but, like, are we all squared away with, like, BH?
Yes.
Okay.
there was a lot in motion for BH, right?
I think they had the SSO issues, the data sync issues.
that they wanted that S-C-I-M or whatever.
Yeah, so she finally got back to me and was like, you know what?
So the thing with Skim.
is that… What they want to be able to do is create a user, like, in their… email client, right, or whatever, and, like, that user gets created across their whole tech stack, right?
They don't have to go in and click apartment IQ, LRL, whatever.
That user just gets created and assigned.
We can accommodate half of that, which is, like, we'll hear the user that gets created, but we can't assign them to anything, because you still need to tell us.
And she's like, alright, if I still need to be the admin for this, then let's just abandon that.

So… Basically, we weren't able to give them everything they wanted, which is kind of a drag, but we… they're cool, they're like, we'll talk about it maybe in a few months when you've had a chance to build it out.
I put a note into the product thing to say, hey, we need to build that out, because it sounds like they do that with other stuff, so…
Okay, that makes sense, and it came from, like, a not… it seemed like maybe a lower, like, title, too, so it seems like maybe…
Yeah, it didn't come from Jessica, or from the other… was it Kristen, maybe?
It wasn't…
And it's, like, the VP of, like, tech or whatever.
Yeah.
Okay, cool.
Nice to have.
Yeah.
No big deal.
And then the last one was that, like, also then they had, like, that question on, like, the new supply being off.
I don't know if I saw… Vaccid back over.
Let's see, question on new supply.
Was that BH?
It was… of course, they submitted, like, it was, like, a Thursday or something, they submitted, like, 4 different things all at once, I'm just like…
Ty, yeah, Ty's going back and forth with them now, with Amy.
That was of Wednesday of last week.
Okay.
Yeah, I just wanted to make sure it was on the radar still, and didn't get through the cracks.
Good call.
Nick was, like, CC'd on it as well.
Yeah.
Good call.
Okay, I will, bump this with Ty.
He's also kind of annoying to deal with sometimes.
Oh my god, yeah.
He's just fucking… I'm sure he's just, like, overwhelmed, you know, and he's like, fuck, leave me alone.
Yeah.
But, anytime.
you, like, even try to ask him, he's just like, what's the case?
Like, or just, like, it's just so annoying.
Bro, fuckin'… I think it was someone at Portico who asked us to create these custom reports for her, like, to just schedule them.
Hmm.
I sent him the note.
It took, like, 5 days, 6 days for him to get back to me.
I was out of office, right?
So, it takes him a week to get back to me.
Then I'm out of office, but he says, yo, they're an admin, like, respectfully, they should be able to do this themselves.
I'm out of office for another 3 days, so by the time I get back to him, it's a week and a half.
Yeah.
I'm like, bro, I cannot tell this fucking VP of whatever the fuck.
That she has to schedule her own shit.
After, like, 2 weeks.
Especially after 2 weeks now, like, come on.
Like, dude… so, I don't know.
I'll, I'll bug him about this.
Okay, yeah, I just wanted to make sure that one didn't… that one seemed like an actual, like… date, like, problem, maybe, on our end.
Yeah, thanks for the reminder here, Austin.
I forgot about this one.
Yeah, all good.
I was just trying to think, I think that's of our accounts, though.
I'll shoot ram a note, think we're all squared away with, Waterton, BH should be good, anything… Else, that's… top of mind.
No, not right now.
Okay.
Yeah, I think we're good.
I think we're good for a while.
Cool.
Well, right on, are you going to OpTech?
Oh, there, bro.
Alright.
Some shots, we'll crush some beers.
Back, back to Vegas we go, we're actually.
Is this your third… third Vegas trip for the year, or the second?
third.
Oh my god, bro, your friends are gonna start thinking you have a problem.
Seriously, like, they probably already do, and then I'm just… just here again.
This one's a little later, usually OPTEC was, like, early October.
Right?
This feels like it's right before Thanksgiving.
Yeah, it's, like, the week before, so…
That's it.
Not a lot of work will be getting done, we'll just go from OpTech into Thanksgiving break.
It fucking sucks, though.
Like, I mean, I love it, because you're right, I'm gonna go basically OpTech, and then I'm just gonna go out of office until, you know?
But, like, coming back in December is gonna suck.
Yeah.
Luckily, it seems like you kind of fall off a cliff in December.
It seems like a lot of people don't do shit in multifamily, at least, like, the last couple years, but I'm sure on your guys, I mean, with just getting requests for stuff, like…
It's just requests.
And guess what?
Amy just emailed back and said.
the PDF invoice reflects a different total.
Fucking crazy.
What are we doing?
What are we doing?
Alright, I'll mention… I'll bother Erica.
So, alright, so I've got Erica for Waterton, and then I've got Ty for BH, and then you're emailing Ram.
Yeah.
Fuck it.
I think we should be good.
Alright, bro.
I'll let you get to it.
Alright, see you, man.
See ya.
